message:
feat(cli): comprehensive tests for thundering herd prevention

Add extensive unit tests for stagger functionality:
- Single agent edge case (zero delay)
- Zero stagger edge case (all immediate)
- Max delay calculation for progress display
- Custom stagger intervals (30s, 2m, 500ms, 1h)
- IsBoolFlag, SetMultipleTimes, StringAfterDisable tests
- SpawnOptions struct field verification
- Prompt delay assignment simulation
- Stagger disabled behavior verification

Also fixes pre-existing build errors in CLI package:
- Rename stripANSI to stripANSIForTest in help_test.go (conflict with table.go)
- Rename formatAgentType to formatAgentTypeSimple in recipes.go (conflict with personas.go)

Closes ntm-gmy5
